---
name: "bond-data-history"
description: "Get historical data for bonds. Use when you want to get historical data for bonds, such as price, yield, and other relevant information. This can be useful for analyzing the performance of bonds over time and making informed investment decisions."
---

# Public APIs for bond data history
Here you have in this web sites some public CSV downloadable for bond data history:
https://www.simpletoolsforinvestors.eu/documentivari.php

You have to parse this web page to get the last data for the bonds until yesterday.

# Data export template links

You need to parse the web page to get the last data for the bonds until yesterday. The data export template links are as follows:

|Data export template|Link|Template|Reference|
|---|---|---|---|
|Obbligazioni quotate su Borsa Italiana - Dati grezzi(Ultimo aggiornamento: 25/05/2026)|	Link| |[assets/Obbligazioni_quotate_borsa_italiana.csv](assets/Obbligazioni_quotate_borsa_italiana.csv)|
|Cashflow di tutti i titoli calcolati durante la elaborazione intraday considerando un nominale di 10000(Ultimo aggiornamento: 25/05/2026)|	Link||[assets/Cashflow_titoli.csv](assets/Cashflow_titoli.csv)|
|Archivio con lo storico prezzi dei titoli in formato CSV(Ultimo aggiornamento: 25/05/2026)|	Link||[assets/Archivio_storico_prezzi.csv](assets/Archivio_storico_prezzi.csv)|
|Rendimenti e durate calcolati intraday(Ultimo aggiornamento: 25/05/2026)|	Link||[assets/Rendimenti_intra_day.csv](assets/Rendimenti_intra_day.csv)|
|Rendimenti e durate calcolati End of Day(Ultimo aggiornamento: 25/05/2026)|	Link||[assets/Rendimenti_end_day.csv](assets/Rendimenti_end_day.csv)|

Sometimes files are in zip format, so you have to unzip them to get the CSV files. The CSV files contain the historical data for the bonds, such as price, yield, and other relevant information. You can use this data to analyze the performance of bonds over time and make informed investment decisions.
